name: VantaConnector
description: Connects to the Vanta compliance-automation REST API (Frameworks, Controls, Vendors, Personnel, Risks, Incidents, Documents, Tests, Findings, Audits) using OAuth 2.0 client_credentials. Mints + caches a short-lived bearer token, exposes standalone async methods per surface, and ingests frameworks + controls + vendors + personnel into the Shielva KB.

install_fields.label: Vanta OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: From Vanta → Settings → API → Create OAuth App. The client_id is sent to the token endpoint along with client_secret to mint an access token.

install_fields.label: Vanta OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Vanta OAuth client secret
install_fields.help: Paired secret for the OAuth client. Stored encrypted at rest by the gateway secret store; sent to the token endpoint as form-encoded body.

install_fields.label: OAuth Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated list of OAuth scopes granted to the client_credentials grant. Leave default unless your Vanta admin has scoped the OAuth app more tightly.

install_fields.label: Vanta API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Vanta REST API. Override only for Vanta sandbox or a private proxy.

install_fields.label: Vanta OAuth Token URL
install_fields.help: OAuth 2.0 token endpoint. Override only for sandbox / private proxy.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Vanta API requests per minute. Default is 60.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id + client_secret, mints an access token, and persists install-time config.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Vanta API connectivity by listing 1 framework (GET /frameworks?pageSize=1).

apis.name: List Frameworks
apis.description: GET /frameworks — list compliance frameworks (SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI DSS, etc.).

apis.name: List Controls
apis.description: GET /controls — list controls, optionally scoped to a framework.

apis.name: List Vendors
apis.description: GET /vendors — list third-party vendors with risk metadata.

apis.name: List Personnel
apis.description: GET /personnel — list employees + contractors with role assignments.

apis.name: List Risks
apis.description: GET /risks — list risk register entries with likelihood + impact.

apis.name: List Incidents
apis.description: GET /incidents — list security incidents (optionally filtered by severity + status).

apis.name: List Documents
apis.description: GET /documents — list policies and SOPs under version control.

apis.name: List Tests
apis.description: GET /tests — list continuous control tests, optionally filtered by status.

apis.name: List Findings
apis.description: GET /findings — list open findings flagged by Vanta scanners.

apis.name: List Audits
apis.description: GET /audits — list active and historical audit engagements.
